PrimaryAuthStatus Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The PrimaryAuthStatus type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
AuthTime
Returns the time of the authentication.
Display
Returns the display name of the authenticated user.
IsAuthenticated
Uid
Returns the unique identifier of the associated identity, if any.
